text: Mitosis copies body cells; meiosis creates gametes with half the chromosomes. Both processes are vital for life. But why do they matter? Mitosis is all about growth and repair, duplicating cells perfectly. Meiosis, however, halves the chromosome number, creating genetic diversity. This means meiosis is key for evolution—new traits, new possibilities. Want to dive deeper into the wonders of biology? Like and follow for more!
